name: restura-vscode
description: OpenCollection language support, a Test Explorer, and inline send/run for Restura API collections — right in your editor.
author: dipjyotimetia

untrustedWorkspaces.description: Restura runs the workspace's `restura` CLI and sends HTTP requests defined by workspace files, so it only operates in trusted workspaces.

virtualWorkspaces.description: Restura reads collections from the local filesystem and spawns the CLI, which require a local workspace.

restura.cliPath.markdownDescription: Path to the `restura` CLI binary used by the Test Explorer. Leave empty to auto-resolve from the workspace `node_modules/.bin`, then `PATH`.

restura.allowLocalhost.description: Allow Send / test runs to target localhost and loopback addresses. Editor users typically hit local dev servers, so this is on by default.

restura.allowPrivateIPs.description: Allow Send / test runs to target RFC 1918 / link-local / CGNAT private addresses. Cloud-metadata endpoints stay blocked regardless.

restura.env.description: Optional path to an environment file (JSON or YAML) passed to the CLI test runner via --env.
